name: exposure
description: Robert Bilott's 'Exposure: Poisoned Water, Corporate Greed, and One Lawyer's Twenty-Year Battle against DuPont' — the true story of how one lawyer took on the world's most powerful chemical company and exposed the PFAS crisis poisoning communities worldwide.
useCase: Learn about the PFAS contamination crisis, corporate cover-ups, environmental litigation strategy, and how one person can hold a powerful corporation accountable.
knownRisks: Contains graphic descriptions of animal deaths and human illness — not for all readers
Legal strategies discussed are specific to U.S. tort law — may not apply in other jurisdictions
The PFAS crisis is ongoing and complex — this book covers one aspect; consult current sources for latest developments
